TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sand√ęr Prosi mhtu squ 1920 kawas 1 cigat 6 nici ru 1925 kawas 3 gat 24 nici mhuqil, 65 kawra kawas niya. minkahul squ lomaniya na geki qu Aapaniya qani. aring 1947 kawas ru 1985 kawas qu pgeki nya. minkahul squ Aapaniya htagan nya, ru musa squ oawdiri weyena lru musa mqaws biru pinqwan p'agan g'nux qu hya, ana ga, wana ini suqi qmasuq pinqwasan na biru. 1947 kawas mnwah sanka' ziyit na qalan Aapaniya lru, wa thoyay maqan qu syoheng. pingeki nya hya ga, kbhul msyaw kwara qu geki na squliq. aring 1962 kawas ru 1975 kawas lga, mintiyaw squ Aapaniya ziyit na taygako sinsiy la.
S.PHON: s~…ēan**r pros~…ēi mńßtu s~…ēqu **** kawas~…ē * ¶~ ®i…£at * ni ¶~ ®i ru **** kawas~…ē * …£at ** ni ¶~ ®i mńßuqil, ** kawra kawas~…ē nija. minkańßul s~…ēqu lomanija na …£eki qu aapanija qani. ariŇč **** kawas~…ē ru **** kawas~…ē qu p…£eki nja. minkańßul s~…ēqu aapanija ńßta…£an nja, ru mus~…ēa s~…ēqu oaw*iri wejena lru mus~…ēa mqaws~…ē ő≤iru pinqwan p Ēa…£an …£ Ēnux qu ńßja, ana …£a, wana ini s~…ēuqi qmas~…ēuq pinqwas~…ēan na ő≤iru. **** kawas~…ē mnwańß s~…ēanka Ē zijit na qalan aapanija lru, wa tńßojaj maqan qu s~…ējońßeŇč. piŇčeki nja ńßja …£a, kő≤ńßul ms~…ējaw kwara qu …£eki na s~…ēquliq. ariŇč **** kawas~…ē ru **** kawas~…ē l…£a, mintijaw s~…ēqu aapanija zijit na taj…£ako s~…ēins~…ēij la.
S.FORM: Sand√ęr Prosi mhtu squ 1920 kawas 1 cigat 6 nici ru 1925 kawas 3 gat 24 nici mhuqil, 65 kawra kawas niya. minkahul squ lomaniya na geki qu Aapaniya qani. aring 1947 kawas ru 1985 kawas qu pgeki nya. minkahul squ Aapaniya htagan nya, ru musa squ oawdiri weyena lru musa mqaws biru pinqwan p'agan g'nux qu hya, ana ga, wana ini suqi qmasuq pinqwasan na biru. 1947 kawas mnwah sanka' ziyit na qalan Aapaniya lru, wa thoyay maqan qu syoheng. pingeki nya hya ga, kbhul msyaw kwara qu geki na squliq. aring 1962 kawas ru 1975 kawas lga, mintiyaw squ Aapaniya ziyit na taygako sinsiy la.
